scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n chain,deploy,frontend -c blue,green,magenta "if lsof -ti tcp:8545 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[chain] Reusing existing service on 8545'; else cd blockchain && node node_modules/hardhat/internal/cli/bootstrap.js node; fi" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && cd blockchain && node node_modules/hardhat/internal/cli/bootstrap.js run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost" "if lsof -ti tcp:5173 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[frontend] Reusing existing service on 5173'; else wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && pnpm --dir frontend run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1; fi"
scripts.dev:npm: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n chain,deploy,frontend -c blue,green,magenta "if lsof -ti tcp:8545 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[chain] Reusing existing service on 8545'; else cd blockchain && node node_modules/hardhat/internal/cli/bootstrap.js node; fi" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && cd blockchain && node node_modules/hardhat/internal/cli/bootstrap.js run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost" "if lsof -ti tcp:5173 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[frontend] Reusing existing service on 5173'; else wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1; fi"
